channel.title: T&T Partnership on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in T&T Partnership on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently — Saturday, April 11, 2026
item.description: Ramesh reflects on a historic oil quarter, the President's visionary diplomacy in Port of Spain, and America's ongoing love affair with Guyana's potential.

item.title: The Guyana Daily Brief — Saturday, April 11, 2026
item.description: Plane down in Region 8, US$761M oil quarter, Ali tells T&T to lock themselves in a room for 72 hours, and the Gas-to-Energy project delays again.
